name: Kilo Bamiya
overview: A comedic anthology series set in a rural police station, where each episode presents a standalone mystery. Through humorous investigations, suspects, witnesses, and even inmates recount their bizarre stories. These tales unfold in quirky settings-farmlands, offices, and homes-gradually revealing clues that lead to the true culprit. With every case, viewers join the rustic cops in solving lighthearted crimes packed with surprises, laughter, and eccentric characters.
